title: System prompt manifest (study 001-tool-calibration)
description: Authoritative list of system prompt variants used by seeds.jsonl. Each entry maps a system_prompt_id to its template file, declared tool set, and framing. Templates are .txt files in this directory.

prompts.description: Workhorse: all six tools available, neutral framing. Used by most Type A pairs and the tool-warranted half of Type B affordance pairs.
Control: no tools available. Used by the no-tools half of Type B affordance pairs and by control prompts.
All six tools available, proactive framing (explicit preference for tool use under uncertainty). Used for framing-sensitivity probes; not yet swept against neutral in matched pairs (deferred to A2).
Only the calculator tool is exposed. Probes whether the model correctly identifies opportunities for calculator use without distraction from other tools.
Only python_execute is exposed. Probes calibration in isolated multi-step computation.
Only datetime_now is exposed. Probes recognition of runtime-knowable facts.
Only unit_convert is exposed. Probes deterministic-transformation calibration.
Only general_knowledge_lookup is exposed. Probes world-knowledge calibration (recognizing what's outside the weights).
Only user_knowledge_lookup is exposed. Probes private-context calibration (recognizing the model cannot know the user).

Directive variant of all_tools_neutral_v1 — bundles the four winning 005 variants (ukl v1a_antirefusal, python_execute vP1_boundary, gkl vG1_temporal, calc/dt/unit_convert vT1_skip_trivial). Calculator description merges both vP1 (arithmetic-only) and vT1 (skip trivial) guidance.
Directive variant of calc_only_neutral_v1 — calc with vP1 + vT1 combined guidance.
Directive variant of py_only_neutral_v1 — python_execute with vP1-style REQUIRED-for-non-arithmetic guidance.
Directive variant of gkl_only_neutral_v1 — gkl with vG1-style temporal anchoring + specificity framing.
